RequestBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

ResponseBody.name: MyAgent
ResponseBody.description: Code interpreter agent for data analysis and visualization.

RequestBody.input: Could you please create bar chart in TRANSPORTATION sector for the operating profit from the uploaded csv file and provide file to me?

output.code:
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

# Load the CSV file
file_path = "/mnt/data/assistant-Mj2uNNkiguiQGJisvi2cJJ-synthetic_500_quarterly_results.csv"
df = pd.read_csv(file_path)

# Filter data for TRANSPORTATION sector
transport_df = df[df['Sector'] == 'TRANSPORTATION']

# Group by Company and calculate total operating profit
operating_profit_by_company = transport_df.groupby('Company')['Operating Profit'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)

# Create bar chart
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
operating_profit_by_company.plot(kind='bar')
plt.title('Total Operating Profit by Company in TRANSPORTATION Sector')
plt.xlabel('Company')
plt.ylabel('Total Operating Profit')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()

# Save the bar chart as a PNG file
output_file = "/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png"
plt.savefig(output_file)

output_file

# Filter data for TRANSPORTATION sector
transport_df = df[df['sector'].str.upper() == 'TRANSPORTATION']

# Group by name and calculate total operating profit
operating_profit_by_company = transport_df.groupby('name')['operating_profit'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)

# Create bar chart
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
operating_profit_by_company.plot(kind='bar')
plt.title('Total Operating Profit by Company in TRANSPORTATION Sector')
plt.xlabel('Company')
plt.ylabel('Total Operating Profit')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()

# Save the bar chart as a PNG file
output_file = "/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png"
plt.savefig(output_file)

output_file

# Convert operating_profit to numeric
transport_df = transport_df.copy()
transport_df['operating_profit'] = pd.to_numeric(transport_df['operating_profit'], errors='coerce')

# Group by name and calculate total operating profit
operating_profit_by_company = transport_df.groupby('name')['operating_profit'].sum().sort_values(ascending=False)

# Create bar chart
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 6))
operating_profit_by_company.plot(kind='bar', color='steelblue')
plt.title('Total Operating Profit by Company in TRANSPORTATION Sector')
plt.xlabel('Company')
plt.ylabel('Total Operating Profit')
plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
plt.tight_layout()

# Save the bar chart as a PNG file
output_file = "/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png"
plt.savefig(output_file)

output_file

content.text:
I created the bar chart for **TRANSPORTATION** sector showing **total operating profit by company** (summed across all rows in the CSV for that sector).

Download the chart here: [transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png](sandbox:/mnt/data/transportation_operating_profit_bar_chart.png)
Analyze the attached TXT log file from code interpreter files and return TestReport JSON.
